subject: ROBOT e2e test cases improvements for csar/zip tosca package validation in VNFSDK and SDC Onbarding
commit_message:
ROBOT e2e test cases improvements for csar/zip tosca package validation in VNFSDK and SDC Onbarding

Issue-ID: INT-1240

Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Kuzmicki <krzysztof.kuzmicki@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I58fbd642057650d76a65fdd4ba08f562acb44522

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
